# Fabric Capacity SKUs (2026 Refresh)

Microsoft Fabric continues to sell pooled capacity in F-SKUs, from F2 up to
F2048. This is the 2026 snapshot that supersedes the 2025 Q3 note. Pricing is
per capacity unit per hour, billed whether or not the capacity is used.

## Questions Answered
- What is the current F-SKU range and billing model?
- How does pooled capacity differ from per-workload consumption billing?

## Questions Raised
- Does pooled capacity still make sense for bursty agentic workloads?
